# ZAPIER_TRIGGER_MAP.md — DEPRECATED

**Status:** SUPERSEDED
**Superseded by:** `docs/MAKE_TRIGGER_MAP.md` (v1.0, 2026-06-16)
**Reason:** Zapier removed from the automation stack. Make.com is now the only automation layer. All trigger mappings originally in this file have been migrated to the Make.com trigger map.

**Do not edit.** Refer to `docs/MAKE_TRIGGER_MAP.md` for the current source of truth.
